title: Artificial Ruscus Garland 6ft Green Leaf Garland Silk Wedding Decor Crafts
features: COMPOSITION - These ruscus garlands are made of lots of artificial silk leaves.
USAGE - Ideal to use as centrepieces and table runners on dinner tables, wedding tables, events and birthdays. Can be used with other artificial flowers for a mixed arrangement.
VERSATILE - A great decorative addition that can be used in many different venues and settings such as restaurants, cafes, home, schools, nurseries and much more.
description: AVAILABLE IN GREEN THESE RUSCUS GARLANDS ARE MADE OF LOTS OF ARTIFICIAL SILK LEAVES EACH STRAND IS 6FT LONG IDEALY FOR A MIXED OR INDIVIDUAL ARRANGEMENTS THE COLOUR MATCHES ANY COLOUR THEME.
